headline: Jefferies downgrades CMS energy after surprise CFO exit, cuts target to hold woes
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies has downgraded utility company CMS Energy from Buy to Hold and cut its price target to $74 from $88, citing growing uncertainty surrounding the company's leadership transition, data center growth prospects, and the future of its NorthStar business segment.

headline: Jefferies Downgrades CMS Energy to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $74
summary: Jefferies  analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith   downgrades CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $88 to $74.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on CMS Energy, Lowers Price Target to $81
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $82 to $81.
